creator: freebsd@kumba.dev
text:
(In reply to Nikola Kolev from comment #7)
> No need of libevent.so nor libevent2. It uses separate libevent on purpose and it works as expect.
Well, now I can't even reproduce my original issue where, in the jail, the obhttpd binary installed via pkg complained about a missing libevent.so.  I am wondering if I inadvertently downloaded a bad *.pkg file or something, cause I know I'm not imagining things here.  I typically use pkg for everything and only fall back to building from ports when the pkg-copy won't work for me or I want to customize its dependencies.

Eh well, it is what it is.  I'll consider whatever it was fixed and just move on to other bugs/fires.  If it ever reappears, I'll try to take a closer look to see if I can work out an actual root cause and either re-open this bug or create a new one if I am absolutely sure it's a legit bug.

Thanks!
